headlines.title: Russia's Oil Revenues Surge $6.3 Billion as High Prices Offset Production Losses
headlines.summary: Russia’s oil export revenues have continued to rise despite lower production thanks to high oil prices. headlines.summary: Crude oil inventories in the United States decreased by 4.3 million barrels during the week ending May 8, according to new data from the U.S. Energy Information Administration (EIA) released on Wednesday.
